metrics.name: Collateral integrity
metrics.desc:
Collateral mechanism: Contract ETH balance directly defines supply
Custody mechanism: Fully on-chain in the wrapper contract

metrics.name: Collateral integrity
metrics.desc:
Collateral backing is direct and on-chain.
Supply is defined by contract ETH balance itself.

metrics.desc: Withdraw mechanism: On-chain permissionless function

metrics.desc:
The redemption path is direct and minimal.

metrics.desc: Accounting mechanism: Balances stored on-chain using simple mappings

metrics.desc:

It behaves as a standard ERC-20 token and the wrapping/unwrapping interface is minimal.
